predicates.name: is_last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the company's last closed financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company is a small company in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_subsidiary_company
predicates.description: The company is a subsidiary company at the balance sheet date of the financial year.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company is a parent company at the balance sheet date of the financial year.

predicates.name: employee_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the employee threshold for micro-company status in the financial year.

predicates.name: net_turnover_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the net turnover threshold for micro-company status in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_total_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold for micro-company status in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the micro-company size criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: no_more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company does not exceed more than one of the micro-company size criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company under the statutory definition.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excluding_vat
functions.description: The company's annual net turnover excluding value added tax in the financial year.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The company's balance sheet total in the financial year.
